2606.23459.title: TriggerBench: Investigating Prospective Memory for Large Language Models
2606.23459.paper_summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long interactions, existing evaluations focus predominantly on retrospective memory (RM) via explicit queries. Prospective memory (PM), the critical ability to spontaneously recall and act on latent constraints without direct prompts, remains largely unevaluated. We introduce TriggerBench, a comprehensive PM benchmark spanning five dimensions across both daily assistants and professional workflows. TriggerBench pairs scenarios with matched RM controls, contrastive positive/negative variants, and overloaded triggers, enabling fine-grained measurement of proactive recall, false-alarm rate, and attentional robustness under a single protocol. Our evaluation yields three key findings. (i) PM shows a precision-recall trade-off and attentional fragility. Though enhanced reasoning significantly improves proactive recall, models may overfit to an "always-remind" heuristic. Furthermore, PM accuracy degrades substantially under implicit constraints or triggers overloaded by concurrent user requests, indicating that robust PM remains an open challenge. (ii) PM is notably harder than RM: on identical contexts, RM near-saturates up to 100K tokens, while PM decays sharply as context length scales. (iii) PM may serve as a behavioral probe of spare reasoning capacity. Pairing PM scenarios with AIME-2025 math problems reveals that successful trajectories yield higher PM accuracy than failed ones at the same context length, showing PM tracks spare reasoning budget that token count obscures. Project page: https://github.com/KristenZHANG/TriggerBench-Official.
2606.23459.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在長期互動中的應用日益增多，但現有評估主要集中在通過明確查詢進行的回顧性記憶（RM）。前瞻性記憶（PM），即在沒有直接提示的情況下自發回憶和行動於潛在約束的關鍵能力，仍然在很大程度上未被評估。我們引入了TriggerBench，一個涵蓋日常助手和專業工作流程的五個維度的綜合PM基準。TriggerBench將場景與匹配的RM控制、對比的正/負變體和過載觸發器配對，能夠在單一協議下細緻地測量主動回憶、誤報率和注意力穩健性。我們的評估得出了三個關鍵發現。(i) PM顯示出精確度-召回率的權衡和注意力的脆弱性。雖然增強推理顯著提高了主動回憶，但模型可能過度擬合於“始終提醒”的啟發式。此外，PM的準確性在隱性約束或被同時用戶請求過載的觸發器下顯著下降，這表明穩健的PM仍然是一個未解的挑戰。(ii) PM顯著比RM更困難：在相同的上下文中，RM在100K標記附近幾乎飽和，而PM隨著上下文長度的增加急劇衰減。(iii) PM可能作為稀疏推理能力的行為探針。將PM場景與AIME-2025數學問題配對顯示，成功的軌跡在相同上下文長度下產生的PM準確性高於失敗的軌跡，顯示PM追蹤了標記數量所掩蓋的稀疏推理預算。項目頁面：https://github.com/KristenZHANG/TriggerBench-Official。
2606.23459.author: Tianhua Zhang et.al.
2606.23459.authors: Tianhua Zhang, Xinjiang Wang, Qianxi Zhang, Qi Chen, Kun Li, Yaoqi Chen, Dingdong Wang, Helen Meng, Yan Lu
